data.body:
[A Thank-You Letter from the Operations Team]

To all the senseis who always cherish Blue Archive, the operations team has prepared a letter of gratitude just for you.

We look forward to your continued love and support!

➡️ Full details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3165366

#BlueArchive
